# Generated vs Refactored: external

Metrics based on `.generated/` (comment-stripped, semantically equivalent to originals)
vs `.refactored/` jq++ source files.

| | Generated | Refactored sources | of which: shared | Change |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Lines | 93 | 81 | 7 | −12 (−12%) |
| Words | 164 | 138 | 13 | −26 (−15%) |
